name: Feet Adjustment
label: Feet Adjustment
description:
Ensures feet dynamically adapt to ground level with
realistic placement and movement.

**Ground Offset** adjusts the vertical ground reference.

The **Feet On Floor** panel keeps the feet on the ground:
**Strength** (overall amount, 0 disables), **Sole Height**
(toe-to-ground gap), **Jump Height** (airborne threshold that
suspends correction), **Body Smooth** and **Foot Smooth**
(response smoothing for the body and per-foot adjustments),
**Max Foot Tilt** (how far a foot may tilt to set a contact on
the ground), and **Reach Tilt** (extra toe-dip to keep contact
when the leg can't reach down).

The **Heels** panel raises the foot into a **High Heel** pose.

**Reduce Sliding** holds a planted foot in place to stop
skating: enable it, then set **Strength** (how firmly it locks)
and **Slide Distance** (how far it may drift before releasing,
to avoid over-stretching the leg).

**Foot Angle** adds manual **Rotate X**, **Y**, and **Z**
offsets.

values.name: Ground Offset
values.label: Ground Offset
values.description: Adjusts the vertical offset of the ground level.

descriptions.ja: 地面レベルの垂直オフセットを調整する。
descriptions.zh-TW: 調整地面的垂直偏移量。
descriptions.zh-CN: 调整地面水平的垂直偏移量。

values.name: Strength
values.label: Strength
values.description: Controls how strongly feet are pulled to the ground. 0 = disabled.

descriptions.ja: 足が地面に引き付けられる強さを制御する。0 = 無効。
descriptions.zh-TW: 控制足部貼地的強度。0 = 禁用。
descriptions.ko: 발이 지면에 얼마나 강하게 당겨지는지 제어합니다. 0 = 비활성화.
descriptions.zh-CN: 控制足部被拉向地面的强度。 0 = 关闭。

values.name: Sole Height
values.label: Sole Height
values.description: The desired distance from the ground to the toe bone.

descriptions.ja: 地面からつま先骨までの目標距離。
descriptions.zh-TW: 腳趾骨骼到地面的期望距離。
descriptions.zh-CN: 期望的从地面到脚趾骨的距离。

values.name: Jump Height
values.label: Jump Height
values.description: Minimum height above ground for both feet to be considered a jump.

descriptions.ja: 両足がジャンプとみなされるための最低地上高。
descriptions.zh-TW: 雙腳懸空被判定為跳躍的最小地面高度。
descriptions.ko: 두 발 모두 점프로 간주되기 위한 최소 지면 위 높이입니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 双脚被视为跳跃所需的最小高度。

values.name: Body Smooth
values.label: Body Smooth
values.description: Smoothing time for the body's vertical correction. Higher = smoother but laggier.

descriptions.ja: (Smoothing time for the body's vertical correction. Higher = smoother but laggier.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Smoothing time for the body's vertical correction. Higher = smoother but laggier.)
descriptions.ko: (Smoothing time for the body's vertical correction. Higher = smoother but laggier.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Smoothing time for the body's vertical correction. Higher = smoother but laggier.)

values.name: Foot Smooth
values.label: Foot Smooth
values.description: Smoothing time for each foot's shift and tilt. 0 = instant.

descriptions.ja: (Smoothing time for each foot's shift and tilt. 0 = instant.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Smoothing time for each foot's shift and tilt. 0 = instant.)
descriptions.ko: (Smoothing time for each foot's shift and tilt. 0 = instant.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Smoothing time for each foot's shift and tilt. 0 = instant.)

values.name: Max Foot Tilt
values.label: Max Foot Tilt
values.description: Maximum foot pitch (degrees) used to tilt a contact onto the ground.

descriptions.ja: (Maximum foot pitch (degrees) used to tilt a contact onto the ground.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Maximum foot pitch (degrees) used to tilt a contact onto the ground.)
descriptions.ko: (Maximum foot pitch (degrees) used to tilt a contact onto the ground.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Maximum foot pitch (degrees) used to tilt a contact onto the ground.)

values.name: Reach Tilt
values.label: Reach Tilt
values.description: Maximum toe-dip (degrees) used to keep contact when the leg can't reach the ground.

descriptions.ja: (Maximum toe-dip (degrees) used to keep contact when the leg can't reach the ground.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Maximum toe-dip (degrees) used to keep contact when the leg can't reach the ground.)
descriptions.ko: (Maximum toe-dip (degrees) used to keep contact when the leg can't reach the ground.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Maximum toe-dip (degrees) used to keep contact when the leg can't reach the ground.)

values.name: High Heels
values.label: High Heels
values.description: Adjusts the height of the high heel pose.

descriptions.ja: ハイヒールポーズの高さを調整する。
descriptions.zh-TW: 調整高跟鞋姿勢的高度。

values.name: Strength
values.label: Strength
values.description: How strongly a planted foot holds its horizontal position. 0 = free, 1 = fully locked.

descriptions.ja: (How strongly a planted foot holds its horizontal position. 0 = free, 1 = fully locked.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (How strongly a planted foot holds its horizontal position. 0 = free, 1 = fully locked.)
descriptions.ko: (How strongly a planted foot holds its horizontal position. 0 = free, 1 = fully locked.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (How strongly a planted foot holds its horizontal position. 0 = free, 1 = fully locked.)

values.name: Slide Distance
values.label: Slide Distance
values.description: Maximum horizontal hold distance before the foot is allowed to slide (avoids over-stretching).

descriptions.ja: (Maximum horizontal hold distance before the foot is allowed to slide (avoids over-stretching).)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Maximum horizontal hold distance before the foot is allowed to slide (avoids over-stretching).)
descriptions.ko: (Maximum horizontal hold distance before the foot is allowed to slide (avoids over-stretching).)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Maximum horizontal hold distance before the foot is allowed to slide (avoids over-stretching).)

values.name: Rotate X
values.label: Rotate X
values.description: Adjusts the rotation of the foot around the X-axis.

descriptions.ja: 足のX軸周りの回転を調整する。
descriptions.zh-TW: 調整足部繞 X 軸的旋轉。

values.name: Rotate Y
values.label: Rotate Y
values.description: Adjusts the rotation of the foot around the Y-axis.

descriptions.ja: 足のY軸周りの回転を調整する。
descriptions.zh-TW: 調整足部繞 Y 軸的旋轉。

values.name: Rotate Z
values.label: Rotate Z
values.description: Adjusts the rotation of the foot around the Z-axis.

descriptions.ja: 足のZ軸周りの回転を調整する。
descriptions.zh-TW: 調整足部繞 Z 軸的旋轉。
